title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: 這條霸王龍會成為全球最昂貴的恐龍化石嗎？
summary: 一具有6700萬年歷史的霸王龍（T. rex）化石將在紐約拍賣，拍前估值高於任何其他恐龍。

title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
summary: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
summary: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
summary: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

title: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
summary: About 200 protesters marched through San Francisco on Saturday, calling on leading AI companies to halt development of more powerful models over concerns about AI safety, jobs, and the environment.

title: Claude's Personality Changes Depending on the Model—And the Language You Speak
summary: According to new Anthropic research, Claude consistently expresses different values across models and languages.

title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
summary: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.

title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
summary: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.

title: UK tokenization push could add as much as $44B to annual output by 2035: Report
summary: The government-backed roadmap calls for the UK’s first digital gilt by early 2027 and seeks to make tokenized bonds usable for trading and borrowing.
